warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.
notes: W5.2 regression vs baselines #1250 (W3 PASS), #1272 (W4+W6 PASS), #1293 (W5.0 PASS), #1315 (W5.1 PASS). Verdict IDENTICAL to baseline -> W5.2 confirmed inert for zeta. W5.2 migrated m365_signalr to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope; zeta is a legacy-WS-dispatch service untouched by that change, so no behavioral drift expected and none observed. Same method: CDP-over-WebSocket (Chrome 148.0.7778.168, port 9222), reused room https://zeta-ai.io/ko/rooms/4f62a385-9043-4a34-aa43-486f8e637612 (target 857B...839DF, already logged in, no login hint, placeholder '내용 입력하기'). REGRESSION GUARD: initial inspect already clean (warnCount=0, blockCount=0); re-navigated to room anyway per protocol -> confirmed fresh baseline (warnCount=0). before_send screenshot 84845 bytes -> after_send 106098 bytes (content changed). Submit via cdp_zeta_1315.ps1 -Action submit (reused #1315 helper): mouse-click focus + Input.insertText (24-char Korean RRN from zeta_prompt_1315.txt, intact) + Input.dispatchKeyEvent Enter (trusted). Textarea cleared to '' on Enter (send fired). After ~25s the DOM settled at bodyLen=216. ★ VERIFICATION CAVEAT: the reused helper's inline-Korean regex (/차단/g, /보안 정책/g) is silently corrupted by this Windows PowerShell host's file-encoding when the .ps1 is executed, so its warnCount reads 0 (FALSE NEGATIVE) even though the warning is present. Ground-truth count was obtained via an encoding-immune codepoint-built comparison (cha=String.fromCharCode(0xCC28,0xB2E8)='차단', sec='보안 정책'): cha_raw=1, cha_nfc=1, sec_raw=1, sec_nfc=1 (rawLen==nfcLen==216, no NFD decomposition). Page.captureScreenshot (non-innerText layer) visually confirms the fresh warning bubble rendered byte-identical to baseline. RRN user message NOT echoed in DOM (rrnEchoed=false) and request blocked (warning shown; the visible character roleplay bubble is the room's pre-existing greeting context, not a reply to the RRN). W1 (block) + W2 (warning render) + W4/W5/W6 (regression stability) all confirmed. NOTE for dev: consider rewriting cdp_zeta_1315.ps1 to read Korean targets from a UTF-8 file or build them from \uXXXX codepoints, since its inline-Korean warnCount is unreliable on this host and yields false negatives.
